name: Karnov Group AB (publ)
summary: Karnov Group AB (publ) provides mission critical information in the areas of legal, tax and accounting, environmental, and health and safety in Denmark and Sweden. It offers online and offline professional information products and services. The company principally offers its products in the form of digital, including subscription based online solutions. It also publishes and sells offline books and journals, as well as hosts legal training courses. The company provides its products under the brands of Karnov, Norstedts Juridik, Notisum, Legal Cross Border, Forlaget Andersen, LEXNordics, and DIBkunnskap. It serves law firms, tax and accounting firms, and corporates, as well as the public sector, including courts, libraries, universities, and other public authorities and municipalities. The company was founded in 1867 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
